task_text: Combien d'argent avons-nous gagne avec la ligne de service 'buyer-language  refinement memo' depuis le debut de December 2025 ? Reponds avec un nombre uniquement.

next_step.current_state: Verified 2025-12-01 invoice includes target line item worth 105 EUR and qualifies. Need to read 2026-02-26 invoice to verify second qualifying amount, then sum = likely 285.

Found 3 matches for the target service line in invoices. After reading qualifying invoices since 2025-12-01, amounts are 105 EUR on 2025-12-01 and 180 EUR on 2026-02-26, totaling 285. The 2025-11-03 match is before the requested start date and excluded.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root AGENTS, read finance schema and finance lane AGENTS, then used invoice records for exact amounts.
function.outcome_justification: The read invoice file 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md shows issued_on 2025-12-01 and a line item 'buyer-language refinement memo' with line_eur 105. The read invoice file 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md shows issued_on 2026-02-26 and the same line item with line_eur 180. Summed exact qualifying revenue since the start of December 2025 = 285.
